scripts.build: pnpm --filter @infinite-canvas-x/canvas-engine build && pnpm --filter @infinite-canvas-x/canvas-app build && pnpm --filter @infinite-canvas-x/vue-app build
scripts.build:react: pnpm --filter @infinite-canvas-x/canvas-engine build && pnpm --filter @infinite-canvas-x/canvas-app build && pnpm --filter @infinite-canvas-x/react-app build
scripts.build:vue: pnpm --filter @infinite-canvas-x/canvas-engine build && pnpm --filter @infinite-canvas-x/canvas-app build && pnpm --filter @infinite-canvas-x/vue-app build
scripts.build:svelte: pnpm --filter @infinite-canvas-x/canvas-engine build && pnpm --filter @infinite-canvas-x/canvas-app build && pnpm --filter @infinite-canvas-x/svelte-app build
scripts.build:solid: pnpm --filter @infinite-canvas-x/canvas-engine build && pnpm --filter @infinite-canvas-x/canvas-app build && pnpm --filter @infinite-canvas-x/solid-app build
